option?

purpureus cheese

polysporum production of

sharmanii cholesterol-lowering

Which of the following is the correct
option?

Microbes in Sewage Treatment
26. How many of the following are not
incorrect with respect to wastewater
treatment? (Pg. 183, E)
I. A major component of waste water is
human excreta.
II. The municipal waste-water is called
sewage which contains large amounts
of inorganic matter and microbes.
Many of which are pathogenic.
III. Sewage is treated in sewage treatment
plants (STPs) to make it non- polluting.
IV. Treatment of waste water is done by the
aerobic microbes naturally present in
the sewage.
A) 4 B) 3
